retail.name: Intelligent Retail — Real-Time Customer Analytics
retail.description: Edge-to-core architecture for real-time customer analytics, inventory optimization, and in-store AI experiences. Edge inference on Intel Xeon at each store with centralized model training on Gaudi accelerators.

edge.notes: Low-power E-core for always-on inference — product recognition, demand forecasting, customer sentiment

core.notes: P-core with AMX for model fine-tuning on regional data, aggregated analytics

cloud.notes: Train foundation models, generate store-specific model variants

highlights: Sub-100ms inference at the edge for real-time product recognition using INT8 quantized models on Xeon AMX
ACM-managed fleet of MicroShift edge nodes with zero-touch provisioning across 50+ store locations
Federated learning pipeline — store-level data never leaves the edge, only model gradients aggregate centrally
Scale-to-zero serverless inference on low-traffic stores saves 40% compute cost vs always-on

financial_services.name: AI-Powered Fraud Detection and Compliance
financial_services.description: Real-time transaction scoring with multi-model fusion for fraud detection and automated regulatory compliance. Confidential computing via Intel TDX protects sensitive financial data during inference.

edge.notes: Real-time transaction scoring at the branch level, sub-50ms latency requirement

core.notes: 128-core P-core nodes with TDX for confidential multi-model fusion — panel of models votes on each transaction

cloud.notes: Train fraud detection models on historical transaction data, backtest against known fraud patterns

highlights: Multi-model fusion — 3 specialized models (rules, statistical, LLM) vote on each transaction with a judge model synthesizing the verdict
Intel TDX confidential computing ensures customer financial data is encrypted in memory during inference — hardware-attested
mTLS service mesh between all scoring microservices with ACS runtime threat detection for SOC2/PCI-DSS compliance
Adaptive classification cache learns from LLM verdicts — 60% of repeat transaction patterns served from cache at zero LLM cost

manufacturing.name: Predictive Maintenance and Quality Inspection
manufacturing.description: Factory-floor AI for predictive equipment maintenance, visual quality inspection, and supply chain optimization. Edge inference on ruggedized Intel hardware with centralized digital twin simulation.

edge.notes: One per production line — vibration analysis, visual inspection, anomaly detection at line speed

core.notes: Digital twin simulation, historical trend analysis, model retraining on plant-specific failure modes

cloud.notes: Train vision models for new product lines, transfer learning across plant locations

highlights: Real-time vibration analysis on Xeon AMX detects bearing wear 72 hours before failure with 94% accuracy
OpenShift Virtualization runs legacy SCADA/HMI systems as VMs alongside containerized AI — no forklift migration needed
Automated model retraining pipeline triggers when prediction accuracy drops below threshold — Tekton pipeline retrains and deploys in under 2 hours
Multi-plant governance via ACM ensures consistent model versions, security policies, and Intel firmware levels across 15+ facilities

healthcare.name: Clinical NLP and Medical Imaging AI
healthcare.description: AI-assisted clinical decision support combining NLP for clinical notes with medical imaging analysis. Privacy-preserving inference using Intel TDX for HIPAA-regulated patient data.

edge.notes: Real-time clinical NLP at point of care — classification, entity extraction, summarization in exam rooms

core.notes: 128-core with TDX for confidential medical imaging inference, multi-model clinical pipelines

cloud.notes: Fine-tune clinical LLMs and medical imaging models on de-identified patient datasets

highlights: 4-stage clinical NLP pipeline — classify, extract entities, summarize, audit — processes discharge notes in under 3 seconds on Xeon CPU
Intel TDX hardware enclaves ensure PHI never exists in cleartext memory during inference — meets HIPAA technical safeguard requirements
Heterogeneous routing sends simple classifications to CPU ($0/token) and complex summarizations to Gaudi ($0.002/token) — 70% cost reduction
ODF provides WORM-compliant storage for medical images and audit logs with 7-year retention policy enforcement

telco.name: 5G Network Intelligence and Edge AI
telco.description: AI-driven network optimization for 5G RAN and core networks. Real-time traffic prediction, anomaly detection, and automated network healing on Intel-powered edge infrastructure.

edge.notes: E-core for power-efficient always-on RAN analytics — traffic prediction, interference detection, energy optimization

core.notes: P-core nodes for UPF, 5G core network functions, and centralized AI model serving

cloud.notes: Train network optimization models on aggregated RAN telemetry, spectrum efficiency models

highlights: Sub-10ms inference at the cell site for real-time RAN optimization — beam steering, handover prediction, interference mitigation
ACM manages 300+ SNO edge nodes with policy-based firmware and model version governance across geographic regions
Serverless event-driven inference scales with network traffic patterns — scale-to-zero during off-peak saves 50% energy at cell sites
Closed-loop automation — anomaly detection triggers network healing actions via service mesh traffic rerouting within 500ms
